title: cyperus radians var. floribundus
intro: Cyperus radians var. floribundus, also known as the flowering umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus radians var. floribundus include the treatment of fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions or decoctions, and it may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
